points.text: Tonix Pharmaceuticals is advancing TNX-4800, a Phase 2-ready long-acting human anti-Borrelia OspA monoclonal antibody (mAb) for the prevention of Lyme disease in the U.S.

Dyadic International highlighted its C1 protein production platform's capability to progress from codon-optimized viral gene sequence to purified recombinant monoclonal antibody in approximately 15 days to address Ebola preparedness needs.
Dianthus Therapeutics initiated the Phase 3 EMERGE trial for claseprubart, a monoclonal antibody targeting FcRn, in generalized myasthenia gravis with top-line results anticipated in H2 2028.

AstraZeneca — Tozorakimab — COPD — Third positive Phase III trial (MIRANDA) completed, joining OBERON and TITANIA to form a regulatory package for the first IL-33 biologic with three confirmatory Phase III readouts.
Tonix Pharmaceuticals — TNX-4800 — Lyme disease prevention — Phase 2-ready long-acting human anti-Borrelia OspA monoclonal antibody (mAb) for U.S. market.
Dyadic International — C1 Platform — Infectious disease preparedness (Ebola) — Platform enables rapid strain development and purified monoclonal antibody production within ~15 days.

Dianthus Therapeutics — Claseprubart — Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Phase 3 EMERGE trial initiated; global, randomized, placebo-controlled study evaluating 300mg/2mL S.C. dosing Q2W and Q4W; topline data expected H2 2028.

AstraZeneca — Tozorakimab — COPD — MIRANDA Phase III trial demonstrated efficacy across broad population including former/current smokers and all eosinophil levels; three positive Phase III trials (MIRANDA, OBERON, TITANIA) now support regulatory discussions.

Tonix Pharmaceuticals — Immunology pipeline expansion — TNX-4800 (anti-Borrelia OspA mAb) + TNX-1500 (CD40L inhibitor) — TNX-4800 positioned as Phase 2-ready long-acting monoclonal antibody for Lyme disease.

Dyadic International — Rapid biomanufacturing for infectious disease — C1 microbial protein production platform — Capable of generating purified monoclonal antibodies in ~15 days to support Ebola response.

Dianthus Therapeutics — Advancing FcRn-targeted monoclonal antibody program — Claseprubart — Phase 3 EMERGE trial launched for generalized myasthenia gravis; equity inducement grants issued to new hires in June 2026.

AstraZeneca — Respiratory biologics expansion — Tozorakimab (IL-33 inhibitor) — Positioned as first-in-class COPD biologic with three positive Phase III trials; targeting 50% of patients on triple inhaled therapy with residual exacerbations.
TNX-4800 — Mechanism: Anti-Borrelia OspA monoclonal antibody — Phase: 2-ready — Population: Lyme disease prevention in U.S. — Status: Investigational new drug candidate.

C1 Platform — Mechanism: Microbial protein production for recombinant biologics — Output: Purified monoclonal antibody — Timeline: ~15 days from gene sequence to purified product — Application: Ebola virus (BDBV) preparedness.

Claseprubart — Mechanism: FcRn blockade (monoclonal antibody) — Phase: 3 — Population: Generalized Myasthenia Gravis — Comparator: Placebo — Design: 300mg/2mL S.C. dosed Q2W and Q4W; topline results expected H2 2028.

Tozorakimab — Mechanism: Dual inhibition of reduced and oxidized IL-33 — Phase: 3 (MIRANDA, OBERON, TITANIA) — Population: Broad COPD including smokers and varying eosinophil levels — Comparator: Not specified in text — Results: First IL-33 biologic with three positive Phase III readouts; efficacy confirmed across heterogeneous disease subgroups.

Dyadic International — Business development in Japan — C1 platform for monoclonal antibody manufacturing — Expanding IP protection and commercial adoption amid Bundibugyo Ebola virus outbreak response.
